sections.heading: Speed building with mixed content
sections.body:
Practice these words and sentences:

Words: the, and, for, are, but, not, you, all, can, had, her, was, one, our, out

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog
I am learning Hindi typing every day
Practice makes a person perfect
Consistency is the key to success
Hard work always pays off in life
Knowledge is power and wisdom is key
Success comes to those who never give up
Every day is a new opportunity to learn

sections.heading: Practice Tips
sections.body:
1. Keep your eyes on the screen
2. Use proper finger placement
3. Start slow, accuracy first
4. Speed will come with practice

jargon.definition: Words Per Minute - typing speed measure

summary: Complete this lesson to improve your Speed building with mixed content skills.
